In [1]:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
In [2]:
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
from sklearn.cluster import KMeans
In [3]:
data_url= 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/master/data/2020/2020-01-21/spotify_songs.csv'
In [4]:
df= pd.read_csv( data_url)

In [9]:
df['liveness_log'] = np.log1p(df['liveness'])
In [10]:
df_features=df[['danceability','tempo','energy','liveness_log']].copy()
In [11]:
df_features.columns
Out[11]:
Index(['danceability', 'tempo', 'energy', 'liveness_log'], dtype='object')
In [12]:
Xdf= StandardScaler(). fit_transform(df_features)

Because liveness was right-skewed, I applied a log(1 + x) transformation to reduce skewness. The log transformation was performed prior to standardization so that the standardized values reflect the distribution after skew correction.

In [13]:
X_scaled_df = pd.DataFrame( Xdf, columns=['danceability', 'energy', 'tempo', 'liveness_log'])
In [14]:
plt.figure(figsize=(8,6)),
sns.boxplot(data=X_scaled_df),
plt.title('Boxplot of Standardized Continuous Variables'),
plt.xlabel('features')
plt.ylabel('Standardized Value (Z-score)'),

plt.show()
In [15]:
cluster_2 = KMeans(n_clusters=2, random_state=121, n_init=25, max_iter=500).fit_predict(X_scaled_df)

df_features_copy = df_features.copy()
In [17]:
df_features_copy['k2']= pd.Series(cluster_2, index=df_features_copy.index).astype('category')

In [ ]:
inertia= []
K_range = range (1,15)
for k in K_range:
    km = KMeans(n_clusters=k,random_state=121, n_init=25, max_iter=500)
    km.fit(X_scaled_df)
    inertia.append(km.inertia_)
In [ ]:
inertia
In [ ]:
fig,ax= plt.subplots()
ax.plot(K_range, inertia, 'bo-')
ax.set_xlabel("Number of Clusters (k)")
ax.set_ylabel("Inertia")
ax.set_title("Elbow Method for Optimal k")

plt.show()

optimal clusters= 5

In [ ]:
cluster_3 = KMeans(n_clusters=3, random_state=121, n_init=25, max_iter=500).fit_predict(X_scaled_df)
In [ ]:
df_features_copy['k3']= pd.Series(cluster_3, index=df_features_copy.index).astype('category')
In [ ]:
cluster_4 = KMeans(n_clusters=4, random_state=121, n_init=25, max_iter=500).fit_predict(X_scaled_df)
In [ ]:
df_features_copy['k4']= pd.Series(cluster_4, index=df_features_copy.index).astype('category')
In [ ]:
cluster_5 = KMeans(n_clusters=5, random_state=121, n_init=25, max_iter=500).fit_predict(X_scaled_df)
In [ ]:
df_features_copy['k5']= pd.Series(cluster_5, index=df_features_copy.index).astype('category')
In [ ]:
df_features_copy.info()
In [ ]:
sns.pairplot(data=df_features_copy, hue='k3', diag_kws={'common_norm': False})

plt.show
In [ ]:
sns.pairplot(data=df_features_copy, hue='k4', diag_kws={'common_norm': False})

plt.show
In [ ]:
sns.pairplot(data=df_features_copy, hue='k5', diag_kws={'common_norm': False})

plt.show
In [ ]:
df_features_copy['clusters']=km.labels_
In [ ]:
df_features_copy.groupby('clusters')[['danceability','energy','tempo','liveness_log']].describe()
In [ ]:
df_features_copy.groupby('clusters')[['danceability','energy','tempo','liveness_log']].agg(['mean','median','std'])
In [ ]:
cluster_summary = df_features_copy.groupby('clusters')[['danceability', 'energy', 'tempo', 'liveness_log']].mean()

plt.figure(figsize=(8,5))
sns.heatmap(cluster_summary, annot=True,fmt=".2f", cmap="coolwarm")
plt.title("Cluster Profiles (Mean Standardized Values)")
plt.show()
In [ ]:
for col in ['danceability','energy','tempo','liveness_log']:
    sns.boxplot(data=df_features_copy, x='clusters', y=col)
    plt.title(f"{col.capitalize()} by Cluster")
    plt.show()
In [ ]:
sns.pairplot(df_features_copy[['danceability','energy','tempo','liveness_log','clusters']],
             hue='clusters', diag_kind='kde')
plt.show()
In [ ]:
pd.crosstab(df_features_copy['clusters'], df['playlist_genre'])
In [ ]:
pd.crosstab(df_features_copy['clusters'], df['mode'])
